**Late visual context as seen by MJR (the player): The scene depicts a dark and somewhat grim environment, with an object that can be seen on the ground, possibly dead or mortally wounded, evidenced by scratches on a stone next to them. In the area, there are several objects visible. This object is likely a weapon, based on its appearance and the context of the scene. The ground is covered in dirt, rocks, and various other debris, suggesting that the area may be outdoors or in a natural setting. Small white flowers are visible in the top half of the scene, adding a touch of color to the otherwise dark and muted palette. The overall atmosphere of the scene is one of desolation and potential danger. The presence of what is possibly a dead or injured character on the ground, combined with the dark and rugged terrain, creates a sense of tension and foreboding. The task mentions MJR (the player) and NPCs (non-player characters), indicating that this scene is part of a larger narrative or interactive experience involving a story or game.**
Anna: Fuckin' hell, Stella, look at this bastard twitchin' on the dirt like a gutted skeever—bet Dibella's smilin' tonight with all this blood paintin' the flowers!
